heading: Options following decision by agency of original jurisdiction
label: 5104C Options following decision by agency of original jurisdiction

children.label: A
children.text: File a request for higher-level review under .section 5104B of this title

children.label: B
children.text: File a supplemental claim under .section 5108 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: File a notice of disagreement under .section 7105 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the higher-level review, supplemental claim, or notice of disagreement is adjudicated; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the request for higher-level review, supplemental claim, or notice of disagreement is withdrawn.

children.label: B
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall prohibit a claimant from taking any of the actions set forth in paragraph (1) in succession with respect to a claim or an issue contained within the claim.

children.label: C
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall prohibit a claimant from taking different actions set forth in paragraph (1) with respect to different claims or different issues contained within a claim.

children.label: ii
children.text: wish to withdraw the action before the higher-level review, supplemental claim, or notice of disagreement is adjudicated; and

children.label: iii
children.text: in lieu of such action take a different action under paragraph (1).

children.heading: .—More Than One Year After Decision
children.label: b .—More Than One Year After Decision
children.text: In any case in which the Secretary renders a decision on a claim and more than one year has passed since the date on which the agency of original jurisdiction issues a decision with respect to that claim, the claimant may file a supplemental claim under .section 5108 of this title
